word: G957 - βελτίον - beltíon - bel-tee'-on - Very well

sections.paragraph:
- Original: βελτίον

- Transliteration: Beltion

- Phonetic: bel-tee'-on

- Definition:

1. better

- Origin: a compound of a derivative of G906 (used for the comparative of G18)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: Neuter of a compound of a derivative of G906 (used for the compound of G18); better: - very well.
